import io
import string
import list

fn parse_line(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  let toks = string.split_whitespace(s)
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < toks.len()
    match toks.get(i)
    when Some(t)
      match string.parse_int(t)
      when Some(n)
        if not list.contains(result, n)
          result = list.push(result, n)
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line1 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let line2 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let a = parse_line(line1)
  let b = parse_line(line2)

  mut union: List<Int> = a
  mut j = 0
  while j < list.len(b)
    match list.get(b, j)
    when Some(n)
      if not list.contains(union, n)
        union = list.push(union, n)
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    j = j + 1
  end

  mut sorted: List<Int> = []
  while list.len(union) > 0
    match list.min(union)
    when Some(m)
      sorted = list.push(sorted, m)
      mut new_union: List<Int> = []
      mut k = 0
      mut removed = false
      while k < list.len(union)
        match list.get(union, k)
        when Some(v)
          if v == m and not removed
            removed = true
          else
            new_union = list.push(new_union, v)
          end
        when None
          ()
        end
        k = k + 1
      end
      union = new_union
    when None
      ()
    end
  end

  mut out = ""
  mut idx = 0
  while idx < list.len(sorted)
    match list.get(sorted, idx)
    when Some(v)
      if idx == 0
        out = "#{v}"
      else
        out = "#{out} #{v}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    idx = idx + 1
  end
  println(out)
end
